summary: Frontend testing iteration 12 - All 3 user feedback fixes verified: 1) Tonearms fully visible (76x55px each, not clipped), 2) DECK A/B labels in deck panel headers NOT covered by tonearms (z-10 applied to bottom row), 3) Sampler buttons colorful with distinct colors (HORN=orange, SIREN=red, DROP=purple, AIRHORN=yellow). All 8 test cases pass at 1920x800 viewport.
passed_tests: App loads without errors - CYBERDECK header visible
Tonearms fully visible on both turntables (76x55px, not clipped)
DECK A label visible in deck panel header (not covered by tonearm) - position x=37, y=274
DECK B label visible in deck panel header (not covered by tonearm) - position x=1058, y=274
z-10 class applied to bottom row (deck headers above tonearm overflow)
Sampler buttons colorful: HORN(orange #FF6600), SIREN(red #FF003C), DROP(purple #9900FF), AIRHORN(yellow #FFD700) on both decks
Colorful pads 1-8 visible on both decks with 8 unique colors
All controls visible: CUE, PLAY, SYNC, Loop(1-32), Pad Modes(HOT CUE/BEAT LOOP/SLIP LOOP/BEAT JUMP), FX Rack(ECHO/REVERB/FILTER/DRY-WET), Track Info
Center mixer visible (130x525px) with MASTER, CH1, CH2, CUE, LVL sections
No scrolling needed - Body height 800px = Viewport height 800px
context_for_next_testing_agent: v12 confirms all 3 user feedback fixes: (1) overflow-hidden removed from turntable container - tonearms now 76x55px fully visible, (2) z-10 added to deck panel bottom row so DECK A/B labels sit above tonearm overflow, (3) sampler buttons have colorful backgrounds via style prop with color + '20' opacity for bg, color + '50' for border. All 10 test cases pass at 1920x800 viewport. Previous iteration 11 also passed 100%.
